opinion.h4: BAKER NATIONAL BANK v. HENDERSON, ADMINISTRATRIX. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MONTANA. No. 883. Decided February 24, 1969.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN, and MR. JUSTICE WHITE are of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted and the case set for oral argument.
opinion.h4: ACCIDENT INDEX BUREAU, INC. v. MALE, (1969)
opinion.p: ACCIDENT INDEX BUREAU, INC., ET AL. v. MALE, COMMISSIONER, DEPARTMENT OF LABOR & INDUSTRY, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 889. Decided February 24, 1969.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
